'''vakusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycosis|mycosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycosis|mycosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vakusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vækisith|vækisith]] || [[word:vækisij|vækisij]] || [[word:vækisish|vækisish]] || [[word:vækisi|vækisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vakukusuth|vakukusuth]] || [[word:vakukusuj|vakukusuj]] || [[word:vakukusush|vakukusush]] || [[word:vakukusu|vakukusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vakusuth|vakusuth]] || [[word:vakusuj|vakusuj]] || [[word:vakusush|vakusush]] || [[word:vakusu|vakusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vakufsufth|vakufsufth]] || [[word:vakufsufj|vakufsufj]] || [[word:vakufsufsh|vakufsufsh]] || [[word:vakufsuf|vakufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vakusuthu|vakusuthu]] || [[word:vakusuju|vakusuju]] || [[word:vakusushu|vakusushu]] || [[word:vakusuku|vakusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vakusuth|vakusuth]] || [[word:vakusuj|vakusuj]] || [[word:vakusush|vakusush]] || [[word:vakusu|vakusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vakusuthul|vakusuthul]] || [[word:vakusujul|vakusujul]] || [[word:vakusushul|vakusushul]] || [[word:vakusukul|vakusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vakusuuthuthu|vakusuuthuthu]] || [[word:vakusuujuju|vakusuujuju]] || [[word:vakusuushushu|vakusuushushu]] || [[word:vakusuuku|vakusuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vakusuthun|vakusuthun]] || [[word:vakusujun|vakusujun]] || [[word:vakusushun|vakusushun]] || [[word:vakusukun|vakusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vakusuthuoro|vakusuthuoro]] || [[word:vakusujuoro|vakusujuoro]] || [[word:vakusushuoro|vakusushuoro]] || [[word:vakusukuoro|vakusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
